sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7983" key="a)ndro/klas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρό-κλας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n7983.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weakening men,</tr_> of the climacterical year, i.e. the <per opt="n" TEIform="per">63rd</per>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Firm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.20.3</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρο-κλάστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, prob. in Critodem. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:237:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">237.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
